project.description: Target project in angular.json. Defaults to the first application project.

locales.description: Comma-separated locale ids (the first is the source locale).
locales.x-prompt: Which locales do you want to support? (comma-separated, e.g. en,es)

sourceLang.description: Source/required locale. Defaults to the first entry in `locales`.

skipInstall.description: Skip running the package install after adding @jsverse/transloco.

skipScripts.description: Skip adding the i18n:* npm scripts and prestart/prebuild chain.

skipSample.description: Skip creating the sample *.i18n.ts module and locale .d.ts.
